'''R2-E7''' was a [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]]. A [[Droid/Legends|droid]] merchant in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] once tried to sell this droid to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] when the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] visited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] to investigate rumors of a [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|new kind of battle droid]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' {{1st}}
